title: P_Tab
description:
plugin tab and scoreboard
aba de plugins e placar
body:
P_Tab — Modern Player UI for Paper Servers

P_Tab is an advanced UI plugin for Paper servers that enhances the player experience with customizable TAB lists, dynamic scoreboards, animated elements, nametags, multi-language support, and integrations with major APIs such as PlaceholderAPI and LuckPerms.

✨ Features
Feature	Description
Custom TAB List	Editable header/footer with placeholders and animation support
Advanced Scoreboard	Smart updating system with animated lines
Nametag System	Prefix/Suffix based on permissions or groups
NPC & Vanish Compatibility	Prevents issues with Citizens NPCs and vanish plugins
Multi-language support	Players can change their language individually
Per-world & per-permission layouts	Create different configurations for groups or worlds
Lightweight & safe	Optimized to avoid lag with async and intelligent tasks
📦 Requirements
Dependency	Required
PaperMC 1.20+	✔️
PlaceholderAPI	Recommended
LuckPerms	Recommended
Citizens / Vanish plugins	Optional
🔧 Commands
Command	Description	Permission
/ptabreload	Reload plugin configuration	ptab.admin
/ptabadmin	Opens the admin menu	ptab.admin
/ptab	Base admin command	ptab.admin
/ptablang	Change player language	ptab.lang
/placar	Toggle scoreboard	ptab.toggle.scoreboard
/tab	Toggle TAB display	ptab.toggle.tab
🔐 Permissions
Permission	Description
ptab.admin	Access to all admin features
ptab.reload	Permission to reload the plugin
ptab.lang	Player can change their language
ptab.toggle.tab	Toggle TAB visibility
ptab.toggle.scoreboard	Toggle Scoreboard visibility
🧩 Built-in Placeholders
Placeholder	Description
%ptab_kills%	Total kills of the player
%ptab_lang%	Player's active language

Compatible with all PlaceholderAPI expansions.

🌍 Language Files

Files located in: /Idiomas/

pt_br.yml

en_us.yml

Players may switch languages using /ptablang.

⚙️ Smart Performance System

Adjustable update rate (ticks/seconds/milliseconds)

Automatic NPC detection

Intelligent fallback system for invalid configurations

Warnings when configuration options may harm performance

🎮 Ideal For

RankUp servers

PvP / Factions

Survival

Economy & Network servers

Any modern server needing a polished UI

✨ Credits

Developed by Pedro
